name: twitter-query
description: Query X/Twitter by account or keyword via twitterapi.io. JSON output. You must supply your own TWITTER_API_KEY. No LLM bundled.
longDescription:
Read-only OpenClaw skill for X (Twitter):

- **By account**: `GET /twitter/user/last_tweets` with cursor pagination.
- **By keyword**: `GET /twitter/tweet/advanced_search` with `queryType` Latest or Top.

**Requirements**: Set environment variable `TWITTER_API_KEY` (from [twitterapi.io](https://docs.twitterapi.io/introduction)). Optional `TWITTER_API_BASE` defaults to `https://api.twitterapi.io`.

**Privacy**: Your API key is sent only to twitterapi.io in the `X-API-Key` header. Queries and usernames are sent as request parameters. No analytics or telemetry in this repo.

**No LLM**: Summarize in your agent if needed. Python stdlib only.

Docs: [Advanced search syntax](https://github.com/igorbrigadir/twitter-advanced-search).
author: Alex Wang
